message:
fix(tui): add 5-minute rolling window to tool latency panel (br-93fqu)

Startup outliers and cold-start tool calls were never aging out of
the latency aggregation, inflating avg/p95 indefinitely. Now
compute_tool_latency_rows only considers ToolCallEnd events from
the last 5 minutes. Panel title updated to "Tool Latency 5m" to
communicate the window. Regression test verifies stale events are
excluded.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
